title: Hornsea Four Offshore Windfarm: post-consent condition discharge, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by Orsted Hornsea Project Four (UK) Limited to approve the Kittiwake Compensation Implementation and Monitoring Plan (KCIMP) of the Hornsea Four offshore windfarm.  Date of decision  19 March 2025  Company / location   Orsted Hornsea Project Four (UK) Limitedoffshore to the east of Hornsea   Type of project  Post-consent condition discharge of the Hornsea Four Offshore Wind Farm Order 2023, as made under the Planning Act 2008.  Maximum output  N/A  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
